   $$
   \text{Gross Profit} = 40\% \times \$102,000 = \$40,800
   $$

2. **Calculate Cost of Goods Sold (COGS)**:
   $$
   \text{COGS} = \text{Net Sales} - \text{Gross Profit} = \$102,000 - \$40,800 = \$61,200
   $$

3. **Calculate Cost of Goods Available for Sale**:
   $$
   \text{Goods Available for Sale} = \text{Beginning Inventory} + \text{Purchases} = \$30,000 + \$87,500 = \$117,500
   $$

4. **Determine Ending Inventory**:
   $$
   \text{Ending Inventory} = \text{Goods Available for Sale} - \text{COGS} = \$117,500 - \$61,200 = \boxed{56300}
   $$
